questionHtml:
Which is correct when benzene undergoes electrophilic substitution by chlorine, Cl2, in presence of the catalyst, Cl3Al?


A.  C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H5Cl + HCl

B.  C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H4Cl2 + H2

C.  C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H6Cl2

D.  C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H6Cl + Cl−

meta.title: Which is correct when benzene undergoes electrophilic substitution by chlorine, Cl2, in presence of the catalyst, Cl3Al? A. C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H5Cl + HCl B. C6H6 + Cl2 → C6H4Cl2 + H2 C
